warnings.text: Overexertion detected: Patient Rivera's heart rate spiked to 185 BPM during treadmill session. Session halted.
Overexertion alert: Patient Chen collapsed during resistance training. Vitals unstable — medical team called.
Severe pain response: Patient Okafor reported sharp pain during shoulder rehab. Possible re-injury.
Incorrect exercise form: Patient Novak performing deadlift with rounded lumbar spine. Injury risk elevated.
Incorrect form: Patient Rivera hyperextending knees during leg press. Corrective cue delivered.
Range-of-motion regression: Patient Chen's shoulder flexion decreased 15 degrees from last session.
Incorrect form: Patient Okafor compensating with lower back during bicep curls. Technique correction needed.
Skipped session: Patient Novak did not attend scheduled 9 AM physical therapy appointment.
Skipped session: Patient Rivera missed second consecutive aquatic therapy session.
Fatigue detected: Patient Chen showing declining rep quality in final set. Session intensity may need adjustment.
Fatigue detected: Patient Okafor's grip strength dropped 40% midway through occupational therapy tasks.
Range-of-motion plateau: Patient Novak's knee flexion unchanged for 3 consecutive sessions.
Therapy compliance: Patient Rivera completed only 2 of 4 prescribed home exercise sets this week.
Milestone reached: Patient Chen successfully completed 10-minute unassisted walk for the first time.
Improved ROM: Patient Okafor's hip flexion increased by 12 degrees since therapy start.
Consistent attendance: Patient Novak has attended all 12 scheduled sessions this month.
Progress note: Patient Rivera's balance test score improved from 6/10 to 8/10.
Milestone reached: Patient Chen completed full squat to parallel for first time post-surgery.
Improved ROM: Patient Okafor achieved full overhead reach with operated shoulder. Recovery on track.
Swelling observed: Patient Novak's operated knee showing increased inflammation post-session.
Asymmetry detected: Patient Rivera favoring right leg during gait analysis. Compensation pattern developing.
Progress note: Patient Chen reported pain level decreased from 7/10 to 3/10 over past two weeks.
Incorrect form: Patient Okafor performing plank with excessive hip sag. Core engagement insufficient.
Overexertion: Patient Novak ignored rest interval guidelines and showing signs of rhabdomyolysis risk.
Consistent attendance: All four patients completed this week's full therapy schedule.
